series_metadata.series_description: Records maintained by OTTA's Compliance Officer relating to the training and compliance of proposed or established executive branch standards of ethical conduct and other etics regulationis; conflict of interest and other ethics-related statutes and Executive Orders; and any agency supplemental standards of ethical conduct and other agency ethics-related regulations and directives

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: when old or when superseded or obsolete, whichever is later. Duplicates: obsolete, superseded or administrative value is lost. ; Electronic: when old or when superseded or obsolete, whichever is later. Duplicates: obsolete, superseded or administrative value is lost
